items: Ipsos €1bn AI bet under scrutiny — investors reacting to leadership transition as Chairman Truchot steps down. Execution timeline for AI programme questioned.
Synthetic panels expanding: Ipsos now uses AI-generated persona bots and synthetic audiences at scale for creative testing and product development.
Kantar + Ipsos both automating admin-heavy research: survey building, top-level analysis, fieldwork quality — freeing humans for strategy and storytelling. This is the advisory layer AKT sells.
Stanford AI Index 2026: enterprise AI spending continues to accelerate. Research giants outspending boutique firms by 100x+.
